session_focus: Route mutating git commands through a serialized wrapper so automation cannot collide on the shared repo index.
user_directives: Route mutating git commands through a serialized wrapper so automation cannot collide on the shared repo index.
assistant_responses: Added a root-level git_serial wrapper and documented that mutating commands must run sequentially from the parent repo root.
training_value: Automation should serialize writes explicitly instead of relying on operator timing.
Parallel add/commit/push attempts created transient index lock failures that looked like filesystem corruption.
